title: erigeron oharae
side_effects: Erigeron oharae can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions in some individuals, including skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues like asthma or coughing. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant may lead to stomach problems, including nausea, diarrhea, and vomiting, due to its potential toxicity. Additionally, prolonged use or high doses of Erigeron oharae may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, which can exacerbate underlying health conditions. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Erigeron oharae for medicinal purposes to avoid potential side effects.
